falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes below 4,800 on any single day in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The bottom_2024_aug pattern failed to hold support; the presumed floor at ~5,000 (August 2024 lows) broke decisively, invalidating the structural bottom thesis and confirming this was not a repeat of that pattern

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for 2 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The blowoff score of 40 suggested controlled volatility/early-stage panic, but sustained VIX above 35 indicates systemic fear escalation inconsistent with a bottoming process; this would signal capitulation not stabilization

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield drops below 3.50% while S&P 500 simultaneously trades below 5,000
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This combination of flight-to-safety in bonds with equity breakdown contradicts the bottom_2024_aug analog (where yields stabilized/rise modestly as equities held); it would indicate recession panic rather than soft-landing bottoming

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
